title: PipeShare GoDaddy domains (pipeshare.live + pipeshare.net)
description:
PipeShare portal is configured for GoDaddy domains pointing at the OVH server (40.160.72.39). **pipeshare.live** is the primary HTTPS origin for the client portal (`/client-portal/`), including WebRTC screen share via `hp-portal-secure-origin`. **pipeshare.net** redirects to pipeshare.live (301) so Mike only maintains one canonical URL.

Mike must add GoDaddy DNS A records (@ and www → 40.160.72.39) for both domains, then run `sudo bash deploy/ovh/setup-pipeshare-tls.sh` on OVH for Let's Encrypt. Until DNS propagates, the site remains reachable at http://40.160.72.39/client-portal/.

Who is affected: OVH private PipeShare users. SaaS is unchanged.
changeLog: nginx vhost for pipeshare.live (primary) and pipeshare.net → 301 redirect.
setup-pipeshare-tls.sh: certbot + HTTPS config + PUBLIC_ORIGIN/CORS update.
Portal meta hp-portal-secure-origin set to https://pipeshare.live (dbg156).
GoDaddy DNS instructions in deploy/ovh/README.md (A records for both domains).
